name: Southern Premier Roofing
email_body:
Hey there —

Typed "roofing contractor Raleigh" into Google this morning. A&M Premier Roofing & Construction is at #1. You're on page two.

That's roughly 40-50 calls a month going to them instead of you.

I build sites for NC roofers specifically to get them 2-3 extra jobs a month within 90 days.

Free to talk Thursday?

— Joseph
